Module com.example.progettosw
Package observers

Class ObservableModel

java.lang.Object
observers.ObservableModel
Direct Known Subclasses:
Player, PlayingBoard, PlayingStation
public class ObservableModel extends Object
This class is used to manage the observers

    • addObserver
